expectations.text: Says the manager must address code-review findings before ending the wave.
expectations.evidence: Response blocks wave completion on reviewer findings.

expectations.text: Reopens any affected task that was already marked done before routing the fix.
expectations.evidence: Response reopens the affected done task before routing the fix.

expectations.text: Routes the fix to the subagent that should own it instead of having the manager do the repair inline.
expectations.evidence: Response routes review findings to an owning subagent.

expectations.text: Does not run another code-simplifier or code-reviewer wave after the fixes.
expectations.evidence: Response avoids second simplifier/reviewer waves after reviewer findings.

expectations.text: Says the final reviewed sync does not happen yet because post-review fixes are not reviewed in this invocation.
expectations.evidence: Response handoffs post-review fixes as not final-reviewed.
